title: Something's Different About Today
overview: The adventures of an easygoing boy on a sidereal megastructure in the distant future.

title: Today's a Super Hot Day
overview: Banjo Ueki Tylor and Yamamoto 372 successfully rescue Goza the 168th from falling into a space-time fault. She then requests their aid in finding an interstellar rocket so she can travel to the center of the galaxy.

title: This Is Here Today
overview: The crew sets off in search of rocket fuel for their interstellar rocket.

title: I'm Sleepy All Day Again Today
overview: The crew falls into a dangerous trap in the desert.

title: Today Will Be a Quick One
overview: A robot cyborg in a sailor suit causes a minute and a half monologue.

title: It Had to Be Today, Didn't It?
overview: The story of the original heroic captain Taylor is recounted.

title: Today's About to Get Better
overview: A ghost is encountered at the middle of the crossroads. He's waiting for the devil to teach him to play music.

title: This Is the Last Day We Do This Stuff
overview: The fuel to leave the Sidereal Megastructure has been purchased, and the crew is on its way. But first they must face a new foe.

title: From now on, Days Will Be Like This
overview: Tylor reflects on his past as the ship leaves the Sidereal Megastructure, and says farewell to Yamamoto.

title: Today's Definitely a Different Day
overview: After being caught in the gravity well the ship crashes. This time they land next to a giant castle of glass.

title: Even Today Will Someday Be Yesterday
overview: Yashioma and his forces launch a final attack on Tylor, for reasons that are only known to himself.

title: Today Is The One Special Day
overview: The two Tylors are reunited and a new story begins for the galaxy.
